svg.title: SVG ellipse rx/ry auto resolution affects SVGGeometryElement methods

html:meta.name: assert
html:meta.content: Per SVG 2 §10.4, an 'auto' value for either rx or ry on an ellipse resolves to the used value of the other property; if both are auto, both used values are 0. This resolution must apply uniformly to every SVGGeometryElement method (getTotalLength, getPointAtLength, isPointInFill, isPointInStroke).
